description: 5 trade-offs — 3 about CI/CD (should consolidate), 2 about unrelated topics

candidates.content: Caching CI dependencies speeds builds but may serve stale packages. Mitigated by cache key including lockfile hash.
Multiple focused commits vs single large commit — granularity vs overhead. Chose focused commits for easier bisection.
Pinned CI action versions for reproducibility at the cost of maintenance overhead for updates.
Docker images increase build time but provide consistent environments across CI and local dev.
Reliability of local auth vs API key convenience — chose local auth for security despite added complexity.
